S+H Search specializes in executive recruiting within accounting and finance, taking pride in our innovative and proven search techniques. We place professionals in a growing list of businesses ranging in size from emerging growth to Fortune 500 companies across a diverse spectrum of industries. Our goal is to find the right candidate who can make an immediate impact on our client’s business while staying true to the company culture and finding fulfillment in the role.
At S+H Search, we prioritize your career goals and align your skillset with new opportunities, keeping you informed throughout the recruitment process.

REPEAT BUSINESS

"This was my first time working with a headhunter, and I can confidently say it couldn’t have been a better experience. Ashley was incredibly knowledgeable about the company I was interviewing with and prepared me thoroughly for each interview. Throughout the entire process, I felt like she was right there with me, cheering me on every step of the way. I’ve been recommending [S+H Search] to my friends and co-workers ever since!"

"I truly appreciate your responsiveness and willingness to address my questions at every stage. You have been very diligent to make sure that I have all the tools needed to make this job experience a success. Your encouragement kept me motivated, and I felt well-prepared for the interview thanks to your thorough preparation tips. "

"[S+H Search] hit a grand slam home run with this position, and I have been extremely happy in my role and the team I have joined. Their assistance in my job search has literally been life-changing. I have since worked with [S+H Search] to hire several staff positions on my team and have had excellent results with him. In my experience, Jess and the team truly care about placing candidates into the right positions and making long term placements."
